name: Swapful! Edward
description:
We need more swap! Characters, especially smut ones, theres 2 versions, one where your a teacher, one where your a (18+) student, your getting pranked either way, and your not happy about it

"but mimi, why dose it have a smut tag, when its not directly smut at the start"

So you have a opportunity to have a non smut rp

"But mimi, why is there a student ver-"

Your 18+, and this isnt just a smut bot, you just have a option of it

"But mimi, why dose he have a skirt and box cutter arm when he dosnt have those in thr photo"

Cause I can

"But mimi, why dose he insert glitch"

Die

"...AAA-"
creator: Mimi_the_crazy
